message:
perf(onboard): parallelize session sampling with batches

Run session searches in batches of 3 concurrently instead of
sequentially. Reduces total I/O wait time while avoiding too many
parallel SSH/process connections.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
